tags.name: hotpot-swap-widget
tags.description: HotPot Swap Widget - embeddable DeFi swap component

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Theme: light | dark | auto (follows system)

attributes.name: primary-text-color
attributes.description: Primary text color (hex, rgb, or name)

attributes.name: secondary-text-color
attributes.description: Secondary/muted text color

attributes.name: background-color
attributes.description: Widget background color

attributes.name: card-background-color
attributes.description: Card and input field background color

attributes.name: button-color
attributes.description: Primary button background color

attributes.name: button-text-color
attributes.description: Primary button text color

attributes.name: icons-color
attributes.description: Color for small icons (wallet icon in balance, chevrons)

attributes.name: default-from-token
attributes.description: Default 'You pay' token symbol

attributes.name: default-to-token
attributes.description: Default 'You receive' token symbol

attributes.name: default-slippage
attributes.description: Default slippage tolerance (e.g. 0.5 for 0.5%)

attributes.name: swap-warning-color
attributes.description: Warning state background color (status indicator and warning toast state)

attributes.name: swap-error-color
attributes.description: Error state background color (status indicator and transaction error state)

attributes.name: swap-success-color
attributes.description: Success state background color (status indicator and transaction success state)

attributes.name: swap-divider-variant
attributes.description: Swap divider style variant

attributes.name: walletconnect-project-id
attributes.description: WalletConnect/Reown project id used for mobile and QR-based EVM wallet connection

attributes.name: filled-input-background-color
attributes.description: Background color for destination address input when the value is present

attributes.name: spinner-color
attributes.description: Background color of the transaction progress spinner container

attributes.name: enter-amount-button-color
attributes.description: Text color of the disabled Enter amount button state

attributes.name: enter-amount-button-background
attributes.description: Background color of the disabled Enter amount button state
